message:
fix: correctness and ordering fixes across mutex, broadcast, timer wheel, and runtime

Address several correctness issues found during audit:

- src/sync/mutex.rs: Fix drop ordering — release the MutexState lock
  before setting waiter_id to ensure the waker wake() call happens outside
  the lock. Also reorder waiter_id assignment after state lock drop to
  prevent a window where the waiter_id is visible but the waiter hasn't
  been fully registered.

- src/sync/notify_bug_test.rs: Update test to match corrected mutex behavior.

- src/sync/pool.rs: Add explicit guard.completed read after assignment to
  suppress unused-assignment warning and clarify intent.

- src/channel/broadcast.rs: Fix use-after-drop in SendPermit::send() — the
  popped value from buffer eviction was previously bound to _ (dropped
  immediately inside the lock), but the value's Drop impl could observe
  inconsistent state. Now explicitly drop(popped) after releasing the lock.
  Also fix Receiver::drop() to move buffer clear outside the lock to avoid
  holding the lock during potentially expensive T::drop() calls.

- src/time/wheel.rs: Replace panic on timer duration overflow with silent
  clamping. register() now clamps deadlines exceeding max_timer_duration
  to the maximum, allowing callers to re-register after the clamped timer
  fires. This prevents panics in user code that passes large durations.

- src/types/id.rs: Replace DefaultHasher with DetHasher in tests for
  deterministic cross-platform hash comparison.

- src/runtime/blocking_pool.rs, scheduler/three_lane.rs, scheduler/worker.rs:
  Add explicit reads of guard.completed after assignment to suppress
  unused-assignment warnings from the guard pattern.

- src/http/h1/client.rs: Thread max_body_size_limit parameter through
  response_body_kind() instead of using the DEFAULT_MAX_BODY_SIZE constant,
  allowing callers to configure body size limits per-request.

- src/obligation/choreography/pipeline.rs: Replace DefaultHasher with
  DetHasher in codegen determinism test.

- src/observability/otel.rs: Minor formatting fix.

- src/raptorq/tests.rs: Minor test assertion fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
